howItWorks.intro: This water heater size calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Peak Demand = People × Gallons per Person per Peak Hour
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What size water heater do I need?
faq.answer: For 1-2 people: 30-40 gallon tank. For 3-4 people: 40-50 gallon. For 5+ people: 50-80 gallon. Tankless units are sized by flow rate (GPM), not storage.

howWeCalculate.intro: This water heater size calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
